ingredients_text: MILK CHOCOLATE (85%) (Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Whole Milk Powder, Cocoa Mass, Emulsifier: Lecithins (Soya); Vanilla Extract), MILK CHOCOLATE MINI EGGS (15%) [MILK CHOCOLATE (73%) (Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Skimmed Milk Powder, Cocoa Mass, Whole Milk Powder, Whey Powder (Milk), Butter Oil (Milk), Emulsifier: Lecithins (Soya); Vanilla Extract), Sugar, Glazing Agents: Gum Arabic, Modified Tapioca Starch; Colours: Anthocyanin, Carotenes, Curcumin; Concentrated Beetroot Juice, Plant Extract: Spirulina Extract]. MILK CHOCOLATE CONTAINS COCOA SOLIDS 25% MINIMUM, MILK SOLIDS 14% MINIMUM. ALLERGY ADVICE: For allergens, see ingredients in bold. May also contain nuts and peanuts.
